title: Real Time Bus Tracker Exercise
description: This was another early exercise. In this exercise, I used real-world data to generate a map of San Francisco with the current locations of all public transit vehicles. This then updates every 90 seconds, showing the new locations. This was one of my first time working with publicly available data and API keys.

title: Eye Exercise
description: This was an early exercise to practice DOM manipulation. The eyes follow the mouse cursor around the screen. Neat, huh?

title: PacMan Exercise
description: This was one of my earliest assignments. In it, I needed to use javascript to render a number of different PacMan and then make them move. This exercise was one of my first encounters with concepts like DOM manipulation, constructors and recursion. I haven't really touched the code since the exercise, so, for example, clicking Start Game over and over again just keeps on increasing their speed. Maybe worth fixing (one day).
